chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 557 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2516/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 19.08.2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not wish to press instant Petition, which is not opposed by other side. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with pending application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
